title: neolitsea mannii
intro: Neolitsea mannii is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae, native to the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Neolitsea mannii include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Neolitsea mannii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Filipino medicine.
